payload.label: towel
payload.long_description: Off-white/cream folded cotton kitchen towel with blue-gray printed text and decorative graphic, hanging folded on a rack; woven/tea-towel texture with hemmed edges and light creasing, partially cropped at the image edge — estimated distance ~0.7 m from camera.
